## From merkatordev/infrabelow (root)

# Claude Instructions

## Commits

All commits must follow the [Conventional
Commits](https://gist.github.com/qoomon/5dfcdf8eec66a051ecd85625518cfd13)
specification.

Format: `<type>[optional scope]: <description>`

Common types: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `style`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`, `ci`,
`build`, `perf`, `revert`.

Scopes normally match one of the components in this repository.

### Commit Examples

- `feat(proxy): add OAuth2 login support`
- `fix(app): correct off-by-one error in pagination`

## Database

Inspect the locally running database with:

```sh
docker exec infrabelow-postgis psql
```

## Formatting

Word-wrap code and markdown files at 80 characters.
